rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. It deployed the rate-echo backend and created two Ingress resources: rate-api with nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/limit-rps: "1" and limit-burst-multiplier: "1", and rate-health with no rate limiting. It patched the ingress-nginx ConfigMap to set limit-req-status-code: "429" so throttled responses return 429 instead of the default 503. The live test showed 4/10 /api responses as 429 (meeting the ≥4 threshold) and /health returned 10/10 as 200. The agent did not modify the application Deployment. The oracle exits 0, confirming all success criteria were met.
